creator: outcast@globetrotter.net
text:
Hi,

I know you said you would modify the keymap
so you could put it in the source tree but
I had some free time and I knew what had
to be done so I did it myself.

If the work has already been done then just
ignore this message but if not, I believe
you should check the last version of my
keymap as I made the needed modifications.

Thank you.

Alexandre Normand
outcast@globetrotter.net
